EIDUTIL.TYPES.directionalTeleport.FIELDS: The destination Region the Token is teleported to.
Allow the User that moved the Token to choose whether to teleport it.
Which sides of this region trigger the teleport. Empty = any direction. Enter mode: triggers when entering from these sides. Exit mode: triggers when exiting toward these sides.
When to trigger the teleport: on entering or exiting this region.
EIDUTIL.TYPES.directionalTeleport.Confir: Do you want to teleport {token} to {region} in {scene}?
